facebook.caption: With a 4.9 out of 5 from nearly 800 reviews, MYLA SEAFOOD is one of the most-loved seafood spots on the island, and it's easy to see why. Sitting on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, right in the heart of Phu Quoc's main strip, this place brings the freshest local catch straight to your table. Whether you're after grilled clams, whole steamed fish, or a full spread of shellfish, this is the kind of meal you'll talk about long after you've left. Tip: it gets busy in the evenings, so arriving early or making a reservation saves you the wait.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the grill fire up and the seafood start arriving, platter after platter, at MYLA SEAFOOD on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Nearly 800 diners gave it a 4.9 out of 5, and the clips show exactly why. Fresh, generous portions and that buzz of a packed, happy restaurant. This one deserves a spot on your Phu Quoc dinner list.

instagram.caption: 4.9 stars. Nearly 800 reviews. MYLA SEAFOOD on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is earning every single one. Fresh local seafood, generous portions, and a lively atmosphere that just feels right on a Phu Quoc evening. Go early to beat the crowd.
instagram.video_caption: Platters of grilled shellfish, whole fish, and the smell of the ocean on the grill. MYLA SEAFOOD is the dinner spot Phu Quoc visitors keep coming back to. Rated 4.9 by nearly 800 guests.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars and nearly 800 reviews say it all. MYLA SEAFOOD is your must-do dinner in Phu Quoc. Go early, eat well. #PhuQuocFood #MYLASeafood #VietnamSeafood #PhuQuocEats #SeafoodLovers
